introSection: Mariehønen (Danish for Ladybird) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Brændesgårdshaven in Svaneke, Hovedstaden, Denmark. It was formerly named Rutschebanen (Danish for Roller Coaster) from 1975 to 2015.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster doesn't have a chain lift; riders must pull the car up themselves. After that, it runs like a traditional roller coaster.

fullText:
Mariehønen (Danish for Ladybird) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Brændesgårdshaven in Svaneke, Hovedstaden, Denmark. It was formerly named Rutschebanen (Danish for Roller Coaster) from 1975 to 2015.

This roller coaster doesn't have a chain lift; riders must pull the car up themselves. After that, it runs like a traditional roller coaster.
